mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rescuereport(user_id, shelter_id, location, photos, health_status) VALUES (#{userId},#{shelterId},#{location},#{photos},#{healthStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT report_id As reportId, user_id AS userId, shelter_id AS shelterId, location, photos, health_status AS healthStatus, status, reported_at AS reportedAt FROM rescuereport WHERE report_id = #{reportId}

SELECT report_id As reportId, user_id AS userId, shelter_id AS shelterId, location, photos, health_status AS healthStatus, status, reported_at AS reportedAt FROM rescuereport WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT report_id As reportId, user_id AS userId, shelter_id AS shelterId, location, photos, health_status AS healthStatus, status, reported_at AS reportedAt FROM rescuereport WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId}
SELECT record_id AS recordId, shelter_id AS shelterId, animal_id AS animalId, rescue_time AS rescueTime, details FROM rescuerecord WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
